market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: High‑End Villa Near Attractions – Book Now
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Bell Heath, an entire home designed for comfort and style. Hosted by Catherine, this property has earned a 4.72 rating from 439 guests, reflecting consistent quality and attention to detail. The villa comfortably accommodates up to four guests, making it ideal for small families or a group of friends seeking a private retreat. Each night is priced at £2,540, offering a premium experience in a sought‑after location. Although the listing is new – Catherine has just begun hosting – the high review score demonstrates early guest satisfaction. Over the next 90 days, only 15.2% of the nights are booked, leaving 76 open nights that you can fill with the right pricing and marketing strategy. The home features a fully equipped kitchen, spacious living area, comfortable bedrooms, and modern bathrooms, ensuring a seamless stay. While no specific amenities are listed, you can expect the basics needed for a comfortable visit. Book Bell Heath today to enjoy a high‑quality stay with the personal touch of a dedicated host, and take advantage of the ample availability to plan your perfect getaway.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution exterior/front‑of‑property shot as the cover photo—it instantly showcases the villa’s scale and appeal, drawing guests in before they explore interior images.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £2,540 is 1,543% higher than the city median (£154.60) while your 90‑day occupancy is only 15.2% (76 open nights); lowering the price will dramatically improve bookings.
No high‑value amenities are listed; adding and highlighting outdoor space, on‑site parking, and entertainment will align the listing with the top‑performing cohort.
The listing lacks professional photos; upload clear images of every room and set an attractive exterior shot as the cover to increase click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing charges £2,540/night – over 1,500% above the city median – yet only 15% of your nights are booked.
